query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS errorLogs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  level ENUM('error', 'warning', 'info') NOT NULL,
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  stack TEXT,
  context TEXT,
  userId INT,
  userEmail VARCHAR(320),
  url TEXT,
  userAgent TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user c2qSkVB4gKtEmor.bc3c8c9ce52a --database VzNbWtRJAsr2zJAegEjRtX --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS errorLogs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  level ENUM('error', 'warning', 'info') NOT NULL,
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  stack TEXT,
  context TEXT,
  userId INT,
  userEmail VARCHAR(320),
  url TEXT,
  userAgent TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
)
